start_frame.prompt: A serene Japanese garden with cherry blossoms in spring, bright daylight, photorealistic

end_frame.prompt: The same Japanese garden at sunset, golden hour lighting, warm tones, photorealistic

style_ref.prompt: Anime style illustration with vibrant colors, Studio Ghibli aesthetic

asset_car.prompt: A red sports car from the side, clean white background, product photography

asset_building.prompt: A modern glass office building, clean white background, architectural photography

beats.moviePrompt: A calm ocean wave rolling onto a sandy beach at sunset

beats.text: Pattern 2: moviePrompt with imageName (first frame → image-to-video)
beats.imagePrompt: Cherry blossom petals gently falling in a Japanese garden
beats.moviePrompt: Cherry blossom petals gently falling in a Japanese garden

beats.text: Pattern 3: moviePrompt with first frame + lastFrame (interpolation)
beats.imagePrompt: A serene Japanese garden in bright daylight
beats.moviePrompt: Time-lapse of a Japanese garden transitioning from day to sunset

beats.text: Pattern 4: moviePrompt with referenceImages ASSET (subject reference, no first frame)
beats.moviePrompt: A red sports car driving through a futuristic city at night

beats.text: Pattern 5: moviePrompt with referenceImages STYLE (aesthetic reference)
beats.moviePrompt: A character walking through a magical forest with glowing mushrooms

beats.text: Pattern 6: moviePrompt with multiple ASSET referenceImages
beats.moviePrompt: A red sports car parked in front of a modern glass building

beats.text: Pattern 7: first frame + lastFrame + ASSET ref (NOTE: referenceImages is mutually exclusive with image/lastFrame in Veo 3.1, so this tests the validation — asset ref should be silently ignored when first frame is present)
beats.imagePrompt: A red sports car parked in a Japanese garden during cherry blossom season
beats.moviePrompt: The red sports car slowly drives through the garden as cherry blossom petals fall, transitioning from bright daylight to golden sunset

beats.text: Pattern 8: firstFrameImageName from imageRefs (no imagePrompt needed)
beats.moviePrompt: Cherry blossom petals swirling in wind through the garden

beats.text: Pattern 9: firstFrameImageName + lastFrameImageName (both from imageRefs, no imagePrompt)
beats.moviePrompt: Smooth transition from bright spring daylight to warm golden sunset in the garden
